planner.summary: Activates `plan` / `tasks` / `sdd` / `constitution` / `spike` / `adr` / `clarify-task` skills; plans, specs, and task decomposition in one agent
planner.summary_zh: 觸發 `plan` / `tasks` / `sdd` / `constitution` / `spike` / `adr` / `clarify-task` skill；規劃、規格定義、任務拆解一站完成

implementer.summary: Activates `implement` / `refactor` / `test-design` / `context-discovery` / `performance` skills, mode-routed by trigger phrase
implementer.summary_zh: 觸發 `implement` / `refactor` / `test-design` / `context-discovery` / `performance` skill，依觸發詞分流

reviewer.summary: Activates `code-review` / `security-audit` / `sql-review` / `sdd-review` / `sdd-compliance` skills, mode-routed by review type
reviewer.summary_zh: 觸發 `code-review` / `security-audit` / `sql-review` / `sdd-review` / `sdd-compliance` skill，依審查類型分流

debugger.summary: Activates `debug` skill — hypothesis ranking, binary-search isolation, minimal fix with regression test
debugger.summary_zh: 觸發 `debug` skill — 假說排序、二分隔離、最小修正並補回歸測試

researcher.summary: Read-only research subagent for `@implementer` — gathers codebase patterns and external references before coding
researcher.summary_zh: 唯讀研究 subagent，供 `@implementer` 派遣 — 寫 code 前蒐集 codebase pattern 與外部參考

constitution.summary: Project-wide non-negotiable principles and governance — stable, high-level only (200-line hard limit)
constitution.summary_zh: 專案層級的不可動原則與治理規則 — 穩定、高層級（200 行硬上限）

clarify-task.summary: Interactive task refinement — numbered clarifying questions before acting
clarify-task.summary_zh: 互動式任務釐清 — 動手前以編號問題確認範圍

context-discovery.summary: Pre-action context map — files needed, dependencies, tests, reference patterns
context-discovery.summary_zh: 動手前的 context map — 待修改檔案、相依、測試、參考模式

plan.summary: Implementation plan — phases, requirements, files, risks (hands off atomic tasks to `tasks` skill)
plan.summary_zh: 實作計畫 — 階段、需求、檔案、風險（原子任務拆解交給 `tasks` skill）

adr.summary: Architectural Decision Record — captures a decision with status, alternatives, and consequences
adr.summary_zh: 架構決策記錄 — 包含狀態、替代方案、後果分析

spike.summary: Time-boxed research document for a single technical question
spike.summary_zh: 限時技術探針文件，針對單一問題的研究

sdd.summary: Spec-Driven Development document — formal spec before implementation (supports amendment with semver versioning)
sdd.summary_zh: SDD（Spec-Driven Development）文件 — 實作前的正式規格定義（支援 semver 版本化的修訂流程）

sdd-review.summary: SDD specification review BEFORE implementation — completeness, testability, feasibility, clarity audit
sdd-review.summary_zh: 實作前的 SDD 規格審查 — 完整度、可測試性、可行性、清晰度稽核

tasks.summary: Dependency-ordered atomic task breakdown (T### IDs, [P] markers) after plan or SDD is approved
tasks.summary_zh: 依賴排序的原子任務拆解（T### IDs、[P] 平行標記），需 plan 或 SDD 先存在

implement.summary: Feature implementation with SDD compliance, pattern discovery, and self-verification
implement.summary_zh: 功能實作 — 遵循 SDD 規格、探索既有 pattern、自我驗證

sdd-compliance.summary: Spec compliance matrix AFTER implementation — verifies every AC has tasks, tests, and code evidence
sdd-compliance.summary_zh: 實作後的規格對齊矩陣 — 驗證每個 AC 都有 task、測試與程式碼證據

refactor.summary: Surgical refactoring — extract, rename, eliminate smells
refactor.summary_zh: 漸進式重構 — 擷取、重命名、消除異味

test-design.summary: Test case design — boundary identification, category classification, coverage gap audit; hand off to @implementer for coding
test-design.summary_zh: 測試案例設計 — 邊界識別、分類、覆蓋率缺口分析；交接 @implementer 實作

git-commit.summary: Conventional commit message generation and intelligent staging
git-commit.summary_zh: Conventional Commit 訊息產生與智慧檔案暫存

code-review.summary: Structured code review — correctness, style, bug patterns (use `sdd-compliance` for AC traceability)
code-review.summary_zh: 結構化程式碼審查 — 正確性、風格、bug 模式（AC 追蹤請用 `sdd-compliance`）

security-audit.summary: OWASP Top 10 audit with severity classification
security-audit.summary_zh: OWASP Top 10 審查與嚴重度分類

sql-review.summary: SQL review — injection prevention, index strategy, anti-patterns
sql-review.summary_zh: SQL 審查 — 注入防護、索引策略、反模式偵測

debug.summary: Systematic debugging with hypothesis ranking and isolation
debug.summary_zh: 系統化除錯，假說排序與二分隔離

performance.summary: Measure-first performance tuning across frontend, Java backend, and DB
performance.summary_zh: Measure-first 效能調校，涵蓋前端、Java 後端、資料庫

error-handling.summary_zh: 例外處理慣例 — 階層設計、自訂例外、重試策略、錯誤傳播

global-copilot.summary_zh: 語言與技術棧基礎規則：繁中回覆、英文寫 code、Java 8 + Maven、不用 Spring Boot

logging.summary_zh: SLF4J + Logback 慣例 — 嚴重度、參數化訊息、上下文、安全性

javadoc.summary_zh: Javadoc 規範 — 必要標籤、摘要句、格式與反模式

jsp.summary_zh: JSP 模板慣例 — 輸出編碼、JSTL 使用、避免 scriptlet、XSS 防護

junit.summary_zh: JUnit 5 + Mockito 規範 — 命名、AAA、參數化測試、斷言

markdown.summary_zh: 遵循 CommonMark 規範（0.31.2）的 Markdown 格式

no-heredoc.summary_zh: 防止終端機 heredoc 導致檔案毀損，強制使用檔案編輯工具

security-and-owasp.summary_zh: 基於 OWASP Top 10 的安全編碼

self-explanatory-code-commenting.summary_zh: 撰寫自解釋程式碼，減少冗餘註解

sql-rules.summary_zh: SQL 硬規則：injection 防護、效能、程式碼品質（單一來源）

sql-sp-generation.summary_zh: MySQL 預存程序與 schema 慣例

xml.summary_zh: Maven POM、web.xml 及 XML 設定檔慣例

properties.summary_zh: Java properties 檔慣例 — 命名、組織、編碼、機敏資訊管理

yaml-json-config.summary_zh: YAML / JSON 設定檔慣例 — 格式、結構、機敏資訊管理

code-review-checklist.summary: Severity buckets and what to check by category
code-review-checklist.summary_zh: 嚴重度分級與各類別檢查項目

sql-review-output.summary: Output format reference (severity buckets, EXPLAIN cheat sheet) for the sql-review skill
sql-review-output.summary_zh: sql-review skill 的輸出格式參考（嚴重度分級、EXPLAIN 速查表）

spec-template.summary: SDD scaffold — 9 sections from background to changelog
spec-template.summary_zh: SDD 骨架 — 從背景到變更記錄共 9 個章節

plan-template.summary_zh: 實作計畫骨架，含 `REQ-` / `CON-` / `PAT-` / `FILE-` 識別碼

tasks-template.summary: Dependency-ordered `tasks.md` scaffold with T### IDs and `[P]` parallel markers
tasks-template.summary_zh: 依賴排序的 `tasks.md` 骨架，含 T### ID 及 `[P]` 平行標記

adr-template.summary: ADR scaffold with Status / Context / Decision / Consequences / Alternatives
adr-template.summary_zh: ADR 骨架，含狀態 / 背景 / 決策 / 後果 / 替代方案

instructions/.en: Auto-applied rules based on applyTo pattern
instructions/.zh: 依 applyTo 規則自動套用

hooks/.en: Shell commands at agent lifecycle events
hooks/.zh: Agent 生命週期事件的 shell 命令

prompts/.zh: 標準/輸出格式參考，與 skill 配對使用
